heading: No priority
label: 7932 No priority
text: Nothing in this title or the amendments made by this title provides a preference to hunting, fishing, or recreational shooting over any other use of Federal land or water.11See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, means title IV of , , , which enacted this chapter and amended , , Government Organization and Employees, , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure, and , Money and Finance.
